recap: Spain advanced to the quarterfinals with an injury-time winner from substitute Mikel Merino, ending Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup dream in a narrow 1-0 victory in Dallas. Despite dominating possession throughout, Spain required a dramatic late breakthrough after squandering several clear chances, including Oyarzabal's shocking miss in the 82nd minute when he inexplicably shot wide while through on goal. Portugal nearly forced extra time when Bernardo Silva's header came inches from the target in the closing moments, but ultimately paid the price for their cautious second-half approach.
